title: Projektu piegādes vadītājs / Project Delivery Manager (Business-Focused)

summary.lv: Tonybet meklē biznesa orientētu projektu piegādes vadītāju, kas vadīs produkta un platformas projektu izpildi iGaming vidē.
summary.en: Tonybet is hiring a Business-Focused Project Delivery Manager to lead product and platform delivery on its iGaming platform.
